---
title: "promote_axis"
generated: true
description: "Promote an axis or axes to the outermost dimension. This operation might not work as expected if the axes are not sorted."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix._internal.util`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:promote_axis -->
```python
promote_axis(ndim: int, axis: Union[int, Tuple[int, ...]]) -> Tuple[int, ...]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:promote_axis -->
Promote an axis or axes to the outermost dimension.
This operation might not work as expected if the axes are not sorted.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:promote_axis -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `ndim` | `int` | — | — | — |
| `axis` | `Union[int, Tuple[int, ...]]` | — | — | — |

**Returns** `Tuple[int, ...]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
